narrative:
Precinct Scioto Central (precinct in Ross County) has 649 registered voters, with 59.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.1%, a clear Republican lean of 6.6 percentage points.
